name: Bluesky
description: Bluesky social network integration via the AT Protocol (XRPC). Get profiles, search and create posts, browse feeds, and view follower lists on bsky.social.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get the detailed profile of a Bluesky user (actor). Returns display name, bio, avatar, follower/following counts, and post count. Use a handle (e.g. 'alice.bsky.social') or DID.

actor.description: The handle (e.g. 'alice.bsky.social') or DID of the user whose profile to retrieve.

tools.name: search_posts
tools.description: Search for posts matching a query string on Bluesky. Returns post views with text content, author info, timestamps, and engagement metrics. Supports pagination via cursor.

q.description: The search query string to match against post content.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Range 1-100. Defaults to 25.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page.

sort.description: Sort order for results. 'top' for most relevant, 'latest' for most recent. Defaults to 'latest'.

tools.name: create_post
tools.description: Create a new post (skeet) on Bluesky. Uses the com.atproto.repo.createRecord XRPC method to write a post record to the user's repository. Provide the text content and your DID as the repo.

repo.description: The DID of the authenticated user (the repository to write to). Example: 'did:plc:abc123'.

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection. Must be 'app.bsky.feed.post' for creating posts.

record.description: The post record object containing the post data.

text.description: The text content of the post. Maximum 300 characters.

langs.description: Array of BCP-47 language tags for the post content (e.g. ['en']).

tools.name: get_feed
tools.description: Get a user's feed of posts and reposts (their authored content). Returns a chronological list of post views from the specified actor.

actor.description: The handle (e.g. 'alice.bsky.social') or DID of the user whose feed to retrieve.

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return. Range 1-100. Defaults to 50.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page.

filter.description: Filter the feed by post type. Defaults to 'posts_with_replies'.

tools.name: get_followers
tools.description: Get the list of accounts that follow a specified Bluesky user. Returns follower profiles with display names, handles, and bios. Supports pagination.

actor.description: The handle (e.g. 'alice.bsky.social') or DID of the user whose followers to list.

limit.description: Maximum number of followers to return. Range 1-100. Defaults to 50.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page.
